concept_candidates.label: AlarmAndMessage
concept_candidates.description: Signals or indicators that notify operators of potential issues or events requiring attention within an industrial setting.
concept_candidates.justification: This candidate represents a recurring type of human process in industrial settings and aligns with the 'observed-by' ontology hint.

ontology_relation_candidates.label: emittedBy
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates an event or signal to the system or device that emits it.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: This is a reusable semantic relation, similar in meaning to 'concerned by' but focusing on the origin of an emission.
